name: Nordic Larp Talks 2026
description: Annual conference bringing together the world's leading practitioners of Nordic larp to discuss the art form's social and political potential.

name: Degrowth Conference 2026
description: International academic and activist conference on post-growth economics and alternative development pathways.

name: Global Citizens' Assembly on Biodiversity
description: Second Global Assembly, bringing together randomly selected citizens from around the world to deliberate on biodiversity loss.

name: ReFi Summit 2026
description: Annual gathering of regenerative finance practitioners building web3 infrastructure for ecological restoration.

name: Rights of Nature World Symposium
description: Gathering of legal scholars, indigenous rights advocates, and environmental lawyers advancing rights of nature frameworks globally.

name: RadicalxChange Conference 2026
description: Conference exploring new political economies at the intersection of technology, design, and democratic innovation.
